title: UP CNET Exam Date 2026 (Out)

detail.title: UP CNET Exam Date 2026 (Out)
detail.short_info: ABVMU has announced the UP CNET Exam Date 2026 for B.Sc Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc Nursing and M.Sc Nursing admissions. The entrance exam will be held on 6 June 2026. Check complete schedule, admit card date and download notification PDF at abvmucet26.co.in.

content.text: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has officially announced the UP CNET Exam Date 2026. The Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Test for B.Sc Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc Nursing, and M.Sc Nursing admissions will be conducted on June 6, 2026. Candidates can check the complete schedule, application status, and other important details on the official website abvmucet26.co.in.

The UP CNET 2026 is a state-level entrance examination for admission into various nursing programs across colleges affiliated to ABVMU and other prominent medical universities in Uttar Pradesh. The exam date has been confirmed as June 6, 2026.

sections.heading: UP CNET 2026 Subject Wise Exam Schedule

content.text: The UP CNET Exam Date 2026 is uniform for B.Sc Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc Nursing, and M.Sc Nursing courses. The entrance test will be held in offline pen-and-paper mode on a single day across designated examination centers in Uttar Pradesh.

sections.heading: How to Download UP CNET Exam Date 2026 Notification & Schedule

content.text: Candidates can easily download the official UP CNET Exam Date 2026 details and notification from the ABVMU portal. Follow these simple steps:

items: Visit the official website of ABVMU CNET 2026 at abvmucet26.co.in
Look for the latest notifications or important dates section on the homepage
Click on the link for UP CNET 2026 Exam Schedule or Information Brochure
The PDF will open in a new tab - review the complete exam date details
Download and save the file for future reference
Print a copy if required for exam preparation

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in UP CNET Exam Date 2026 Notification

content.text: The official notification for UP CNET 2026 contains all essential information regarding the entrance test schedule and admission process.

items: Official Exam Date: June 6, 2026
Application Period: March 28 to May 20, 2026
Mode of Examination: Pen and Paper (OMR-based)
Admit Card Availability: From May 30, 2026
Participating Institutions: ABVMU affiliated colleges, KGMU, SGPGIMS, RMLIMS, UPUMS, and others
Eligibility Criteria for different nursing courses
Application Fee Structure.
